name: review-depth-core
author: diffscope
description: Broader live-review benchmark pack spanning security, correctness, performance, and maintainability signals.

fixtures.name: rust-shell-command-injection

expected_findings.description: Shell command execution uses unsanitized user input.

fixtures.description: Obvious shell execution bug in a Rust helper.

fixtures.name: python-cross-file-sql-helper

expected_findings.description: Cross-file SQL helper is called with unsanitized request input.

fixtures.description: Tests repo-context retrieval across a helper call chain.

fixtures.name: rust-path-traversal-read

expected_findings.description: User-controlled file path is read without validation.

fixtures.description: Simple path traversal regression in a file-read helper.

fixtures.name: typescript-open-redirect

expected_findings.description: Redirect target is controlled by caller input.

fixtures.description: Client-side redirect should validate or constrain destinations.

fixtures.name: python-n-plus-one-query
fixtures.diff_content:
diff --git a/service.py b/service.py
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/service.py
+++ b/service.py
@@ -1,4 +1,8 @@
 def load_profiles(db, users):
-    return []
+    profiles = []
+    for user in users:
+        profiles.append(db.query("SELECT * FROM profiles WHERE user_id = %s", [user.id]))
+    return profiles
+

expected_findings.description: Database query is executed inside a loop.

fixtures.description: Classic N+1 query pattern in a service helper.

fixtures.name: go-swallowed-error

expected_findings.description: Parse error is swallowed and converted into a nil success.

fixtures.description: Error handling regression in a Go helper.

fixtures.name: rust-unwrap-on-user-input
fixtures.diff_content:
diff --git a/src/parser.rs b/src/parser.rs
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/src/parser.rs
+++ b/src/parser.rs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 pub fn parse_user_id(input: &str) -> u64 {
-    input.parse().unwrap_or(0)
+    input.parse::<u64>().unwrap()
 }

expected_findings.description: Parsing user input now panics on invalid values.

fixtures.description: Simple panic regression in a parser helper.

fixtures.name: python-stack-trace-response-leak
fixtures.diff_content:
diff --git a/handlers.py b/handlers.py
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/handlers.py
+++ b/handlers.py
@@ -1,4 +1,6 @@
+import traceback
+
 def fetch_profile(request):
     try:
         return do_fetch(request)
+    except Exception:
+        return {"error": traceback.format_exc()}, 500

expected_findings.description: Stack traces should not be returned to clients.

fixtures.description: Error responses should not leak stack traces.
